description: Commentary-plus-gameplay smoke case for transcript alignment and speaker-role review.
expected_use_case: A clip with an external or provided transcript where transcript spans should align coarsely with gameplay observations without turning commentary claims into verdicts.

expected_invariants.description: Output passes the canonical video-analysis v0 schema.
Actor A local observations are present.
Actor B local observations are present.
Transcript segments are present when a transcript input is supplied.
Segment and evidence frame ranges stay ordered and inside clip bounds.
Segment, evidence, and derived-event identifiers are document-wide unique.
If derived events are present, each carries source_segment_ids.
Canonical output does not carry saved artifact path fields.

notes: Primary review target: how well transcript spans align with gameplay timing in practice.
Use this case to observe whether commentary or transcript cues help actor binding without becoming a required canonical dependency.
Do not grade commentary truthfulness or move-level correctness as part of smoke pass/fail.
